allow: Bash(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load\(open\('\\''__TRACKED_VAR__'\\''\)\); print\('\\''downloaded:'\\'', '\\''success.downloaded'\\'' in d.get\('\\''success'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''openedInNewTab:'\\'', '\\''openedInNewTab'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''mobileSave'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''mobileSave.title absent:'\\'', '\\''title'\\'' not in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''mobileSave'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''protect.selectPdfFile:'\\'', '\\''selectPdfFile'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''protect'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''batch.active:'\\'', '\\''active'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''batch'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''templates.savedTemplates:'\\'', '\\''savedTemplates'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''templates'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''recentFiles.loading:'\\'', '\\''loading'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''recentFiles'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''performance.webWorkersDescription:'\\'', '\\''webWorkersDescription'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''performance'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''camera.notAvailable:'\\'', '\\''notAvailable'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''camera'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''watermark.selectPdfFile:'\\'', '\\''selectPdfFile'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''watermark'\\'',{}\)\); print\('\\''pageNumbers.formatPageOnly:'\\'', '\\''formatPageOnly'\\'' in d.get\('\\''dialogs'\\'',{}\).get\('\\''pageNumbers'\\'',{}\)\)')
